creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Fri, Apr 21, 2000 at 03:32:54PM -0700, Steven G. Kargl wrote:

>  USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
> +BUILD_DEPENDS= autoconf:${PORTSDIR}/devel/autoconf \
> +               automake:${PORTSDIR}/devel/automake
> +USE_AUTOCONF=  yes

USE_AUTOCONF implies a BUILD_DEPEND on autoconf.

--
